fault_hypothesis: The function at line 65 converts floating-point shares to integers via truncation (`int()`), which discards fractional remainders. This causes the sum of allocations to be less than the total budget, violating the budget conservation principle.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations should equal the total budget, unless a minimum is being enforced (which has a weaker test).
The sum of the computed floating-point shares must precisely equal the total budget.
The final returned allocations must sum to the total budget, except when minimums are applied.
